query:
INSERT INTO products (sku, name, description, categoryId, costPrice, sellingPrice, fobLevel1, fobLevel2, fobLevel3, status, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
('AC-001-CHR', 'Classic Wingback Armchair - Charcoal', 'A classic wingback armchair upholstered in charcoal gray fabric, with high back, rolled arms, and dark wooden legs. Traditional elegant design.', 2, 140.00, 185.00, 185.00, 175.00, 165.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
('AC-002-YEL', 'Mid-Century Modern Armchair - Mustard Yellow', 'A mid-century modern armchair in mustard yellow fabric, featuring tapered wooden legs, curved armrests, and button-tufted seat cushion. Retro style.', 2, 125.00, 165.00, 165.00, 155.00, 145.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
('AC-003-CRM', 'Contemporary Lounge Armchair - Cream Boucle', 'A contemporary lounge armchair with cream-colored boucle fabric, rounded organic shape, swivel base with black metal legs. Modern sculptural design.', 2, 220.00, 295.00, 295.00, 275.00, 255.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
('AC-004-OAK', 'Scandinavian Rattan Armchair - Oak & Beige', 'A Scandinavian style armchair in light oak wood frame with woven rattan backrest and beige linen cushions. Minimalist natural design.', 2, 148.00, 195.00, 195.00, 185.00, 175.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
('AC-005-EMR', 'Modern Accent Armchair - Emerald Green', 'A modern accent armchair upholstered in emerald green velvet with brass-finished metal legs and tufted seat. Luxurious contemporary style.', 2, 170.00, 225.00, 225.00, 215.00, 205.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW());
